markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 3. Illegal Evidence [40800 - 40834]
#### Article 1. Prosecutions Under Code [40800 - 40808]
##### § 40805

Every court shall be without jurisdiction to render a judgment of conviction against any person for a violation of this code involving the speed of a vehicle if the court admits any evidence or testimony secured in violation of, or which is inadmissible under this article.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Every court shall be without jurisdiction to render a judgment of conviction against any person for a violation of this code involving the speed of a vehicle if the court admits any evidence or testimony secured in violation of, or which is inadmissible under this article.
